heroBadge: Privacy-first. Instant risk signals. Built for real-world calls.
heroTitle: Turn a suspicious voice message into a clear decision.
heroDesc: Upload audio/video or record a short clip. VoiceSafe returns a structured risk assessment with recommended actions.
uploadDesc: Supported: mp3, wav, m4a, mp4, mov
contactDesc: Interested in pilots with banks, marketplaces or call centers? Reach out for a private demo and roadmap.
securityText: VoiceSafe provides advisory signals only. Always verify sensitive requests through official channels.
